summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DeezLink e-commerce platform. Backend APIs work correctly on localhost but frontend-backend integration fails due to routing configuration mismatch.

critical_bugs.issue: Backend routes removed /api prefix but Kubernetes ingress still requires /api prefix for routing to backend
critical_bugs.impact: All API calls from frontend return HTML instead of JSON, breaking all functionality

working_endpoints_localhost.status: ✅ Working - returns all 5 loyalty tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond)
✅ Working - admin login successful with correct credentials
✅ Working - magic link request processed successfully
✅ Working - returns admin statistics (20 demo links seeded)

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Something went wrong' error when submitting email
Admin login fails and stays on same page instead of redirecting to dashboard

integration_issues.issue: All API calls return HTML (React app) instead of JSON responses
integration_issues.root_cause: Routing configuration mismatch - backend routes have no /api prefix but ingress requires /api prefix

resource_loading_issues.issue: Multiple 404 errors in console logs for static resources

passed_tests: Backend API functionality on localhost (8/8 endpoints working)
UI component rendering and basic interactions
Demo data seeding (20 links, admin user)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix routing configuration mismatch. Backend routes were changed to remove /api prefix, but Kubernetes ingress rules still require /api prefix to route to backend (port 8001). Either: 1) Add /api prefix back to all backend routes, OR 2) Update ingress configuration to route non-prefixed API calls to backend. Current state: All API calls return frontend HTML instead of backend JSON.
